DotBoxD
Table of Contents

Namespace DotBoxD.Services.Generated

Classes

GeneratedServiceRegistry

Runtime registry populated by DotBoxD-generated service factories.

Structs

GeneratedMethod

Describes a source-generated DotBoxD service method.

GeneratedParameter

Describes a source-generated DotBoxD service method parameter.

GeneratedService

Describes a source-generated DotBoxD service and its generated implementation types.

Interfaces

IDotBoxDGeneratedServiceRegistrationSink

Receives source-generated service, proxy, and dispatcher registrations without scanning generated types.

IDotBoxDServiceRegistrationSink

Receives source-generated service registrations without scanning generated types.

Enums

GeneratedReturnKind

Classifies the generated RPC-facing return shape of a service method.
